Products

Compare cover options

Five products to combine into the right cover for you. Tap a product to see features, payout caps, and term options.

Life Cover

Cover for your family if the worst happens.

From $14.50/moUp to $2,000,000.00

Total & Permanent Disability

Support if you can't work again.

From $11.20/moUp to $1,500,000.00

Income Protection

Replace your income while you recover.

From $28.40/moUp to $25,000.00

Trauma Cover

Lump sum for serious medical events.

From $22.90/moUp to $1,000,000.00

Funeral Insurance

Cover end-of-life expenses for your family.

From $6.40/moUp to $30,000.00

Coverway

Life insurance quotes and policy management in one place.

Demo project - not a real insurer. Not financial advice.
